title: K-VERSATION: Interview with Jamie Gao!
guest_title: Mandarin and literature teacher, The Nueva School
subtitle: Education, exchange, and the classroom
short_description: A conversation with educator Jamie Gao about Korean education and education more broadly.
description: Jamie Gao is a Mandarin and literature teacher at The Nueva School and the lead for its Taiwan Exchange Program. This conversation considers Korean education, the education system as a whole, and the experiences that shape learning.
editorial_description: Jamie Gao is a Mandarin and literature teacher at The Nueva School and the lead for its Taiwan Exchange Program. This conversation considers Korean education, the education system as a whole, and the experiences that shape learning.
source_description:
Welcome to K-VERSATION!

In this episode, I had the honor to interview Jamie Gao! Jamie Gao is a current Mandarin and literature teacher at The Nueva School and is the current lead for the Taiwan Exchange Program.

We talk about Korean education, the education system as a whole, and much more!

Hope you enjoy!

title: K-VERSATION: Interview with Diane Rosenberg
subtitle: Education, Asian education, and AI
short_description: A conversation with educator Diane Rosenberg about education, Asian education, and AI's effect on this generation.
description: Diane Rosenberg is the long-time former Head of School at The Nueva School and founder of the Bay Area school initiative Butterfly Grove. The conversation explores education as a whole, Asian education, and how AI is affecting the current generation.
editorial_description: Diane Rosenberg is the long-time former Head of School at The Nueva School and founder of the Bay Area school initiative Butterfly Grove. The conversation explores education as a whole, Asian education, and how AI is affecting the current generation.
source_description:
Welcome to K-versation! 

I had the honor to interview Diane Rosernberg—long-time Head of School at The Nueva School and founder of a new Bay Area school initiative called the Butterfly Grove. In this episode, we talk about education as a whole as well as Asian Education and how AI has been affecting this current generation. 

I hope you guys learn a lot from this episode and enjoy this conversation!

title: K-VERSATION: Interview with former KBL player, Coach Logan!
source_title: K-VERSATION: Interview with former KBL player, Coach Logan!
guest_title: Former KBL player and Head Coach, Quantum Basketball
subtitle: The KBL and the reality of Korean sports
short_description: A conversation with former KBL player and Quantum Basketball head coach Coach Logan.
description: Former KBL player and current Quantum Basketball head coach Coach Logan reflects on his story, the KBL, and the demanding reality of Korean sports.
editorial_description: Former KBL player and current Quantum Basketball head coach Coach Logan reflects on his story, the KBL, and the demanding reality of Korean sports.
source_description:
Welcome to K-VERSATION!

This episode is my interview with former KBL player, current head coach of Quantum Basketball, and my basketball coach—Coach Logan!

In the interview, we talk about his story, the KBL, the harsh reality of Korean sports, and more!

Hope you enjoy!

title: K-VERSATION: Interview with Starship Manager Sera Shim!
source_title: K-VERSATION: Interview with Starship Manager Sera Shim!
guest_title: Director of Strategic Planning, Starship Entertainment
subtitle: K-pop's global growth and what comes next
short_description: A conversation with Starship Entertainment executive Sera Shim about K-pop's international growth.
description: Sera Shim is a multilingual entertainment executive with more than 15 years of experience across leading global music companies and serves as Director of Strategic Planning at Starship Entertainment. She discusses her K-pop career, the global success of groups including IVE, international artist promotion, and the ways AI may reshape music.
editorial_description: Sera Shim is a multilingual entertainment executive with more than 15 years of experience across leading global music companies and serves as Director of Strategic Planning at Starship Entertainment. She discusses her K-pop career, the global success of groups including IVE, international artist promotion, and the ways AI may reshape music.
source_description:
Welcome to K-versation! 

I had the honor of interviewing Sera Shim — a multilingual entertainment executive with over 15 years of experience across leading global music companies, currently serving as Director of Strategic Planning at Starship Entertainment.

In this episode, we dive into her journey in the K-pop industry, her role in shaping the global success of artist groups like IVE and her insights on what drives K-pop’s rapid international growth. We also discuss the challenges behind promoting global artists, the future of K-pop, and how emerging technologies like AI are beginning to reshape the music industry.

I hope you gain valuable insights from this conversation and enjoy the episode!

title: K-VERSATION: Interview with Yoonjong Park!
subtitle: Computer science, building products, and everyday AI
short_description: A conversation with PhotoWidget CTO Yoonjong Park about his work and AI's growing role in everyday life.
description: Yoonjong Park is a Korea Olympiad in Informatics medalist, Seoul National University computer science graduate, and CTO of PhotoWidget. He discusses his work and how AI is changing everyday life.
editorial_description: Yoonjong Park is a Korea Olympiad in Informatics medalist, Seoul National University computer science graduate, and CTO of PhotoWidget. He discusses his work and how AI is changing everyday life.
source_description:
Welcome to K-versation! 

I had the honor of interviewing Yoonjong Park, medalist of the Korea Olympiad in Informatics (KOI), Seoul National University Computer Science graduate, and current CTO of Photowidget. In this episode, we talk about his work, how AI is impacting everyday life, and more!

I hope you guys learn a lot from this episode and enjoy this conversation!

title: K-VERSATION: Interview with CodeTree CEO, Lee Seung Yong | 이승용
source_title: K-VERSATION: Interview with CodeTree CEO, Lee Seung Yong | 이승용
subtitle: Building in South Korea and living with AI
short_description: A conversation with CodeTree and Branch&Bound founder Lee Seung Yong about entrepreneurship and AI.
description: CodeTree and Branch&Bound founder Lee Seung Yong discusses CodeTree, starting a business in South Korea, artificial intelligence, and how the next generation can integrate AI into daily life with intention.
editorial_description: CodeTree and Branch&Bound founder Lee Seung Yong discusses CodeTree, starting a business in South Korea, artificial intelligence, and how the next generation can integrate AI into daily life with intention.
source_description:
Welcome to K-versation! 

I had the honor to interview SeungYong Lee—founder of CodeTree and Branch&Bound. In this episode, we talk about CodeTree, how to start a business in South Korea, AI, and how the next generation should integrate AI into their daily lives. 

I hope you guys learn a lot from this episode and enjoy this conversation!
